specific_location: Rocking 7 K ranch (CO Birding Trail Site), below the flight of stone steps to the east of the ranch house, among the bushes and trees.
description: Small bird with bright yellow breast, and black outlining its yellow "spectacles". Pale legs. Olive back.Behaviors: Bird was sitting on branch ~4 feet from ground. Responded calmly to my presence about 30 feet away with tripod, long lens on camera. Fluffed up its feathers, then organized them again. After about 5 minutes, it dropped to ground and began looking for something, pecking at things and running a short distance, perhaps scratching a bit. Then moving again. I was not able to get clear shots on the ground because of the underbrush where the bird was.Call: Not observedPlumage: breeding
